message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state with current project progress

Update the beads issue tracker database reflecting current frankensqlite
development status across MVCC, B-tree balancing, pager, parser, E2E test
infrastructure, and WASM compilation workstreams. The JSONL contains
reordered/updated entries for ~3174 lines of issue metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
